offences.offenceWording: From 15 January 2023, used a television receiver without a licence.

statementOfOffence.title: Use / install a television set without a licence
statementOfOffence.welshTitle: Defnyddio / gosod set deledu heb drwydded
statementOfOffence.legislation: Contrary to section 363(2) and (4) of the Communications Act 2003.
statementOfOffence.welshLegislation: Yn groes i adran 363(2) a (4) Deddf Cyfathrebu 2003.
